side_effects.description: Patient went into anaphylaxis/shock with airway closing, responded to Benadryl

protocol_notes: Clinical experience: one patient had anaphylactic reaction to intra-articular TB4 (Thymosin Beta 4) injection. Notes that some people can have antibodies to TB4/TB500 despite TB4 being naturally occurring. Now warns patients to stop if hives occur at injection site. No longer uses TB4 for joint injections. Epi-pen was ready during incident.
